patch.value: Report scope: baseline vs final counts, hierarchy integrity remediation, duplicate-cluster consolidation mappings, metadata enrichment outcomes, validation sweep status, and residual issue tracking links for remaining product-level warnings.
Record final before/after governance metrics, consolidation outcomes, hierarchy repairs, validation results, and residual follow-up items after full tracker refactor.
Report item captures baseline/final metrics, lists dedupe/hierarchy/metadata outcomes, references residual issue(s), and includes reproducible validation commands.
All governance mutation phases are complete and post-pass validation outputs are available.
Publish durable closure evidence for the full refactor
Provides a single auditable handoff record for future maintainers
Improves future planning confidence and traceability
Governance refactor outcomes are captured in one canonical report item
User requested end-to-end overhaul with explicit final reporting.
Run pm stats and pm validate sweeps then compare with baseline metrics captured in pm-wtsp comments.
Governance refactor outcomes and residual follow-ups are clearly documented for future execution.
Report item created with baseline/final metrics and follow-up links.
Contributors can quickly understand tracker state and remaining work.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence pm search governance summary report --limit 20; pm search governance refactor summary --limit 20; pm list-open --limit 20; pm context --limit 10. Net-new because no existing item serves as final consolidated governance report for this pass.

value.text: Includes residual warning disposition for validate_files_missing_linked_paths mapped to pm-m9tv.

value.text: Large governance passes require explicit before-after metrics and residual-risk mapping.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Published consolidated governance refactor report with before-after metrics, validation outcomes, and residual follow-up issue links.

message: Set explicit close reason for governance report closure.

patch.value:
Report scope: baseline vs final counts, hierarchy integrity remediation, duplicate-cluster consolidation mappings, metadata enrichment outcomes, validation sweep status, and residual issue tracking links for remaining product-level warnings.

Baseline snapshot: items=464 before new follow-ups; metadata warnings close_reason_missing=83 estimate_missing=1; hierarchy anomalies self_parent=212 and missing_parent_non_epic=2.

Execution outcomes: hierarchy repairs=214+1 anomaly fix; duplicate clusters consolidated=9 with 31 superseded mappings; metadata contextualization updates applied across all items; closed missing close_reason reduced to 0; missing estimated_minutes reduced to 0.

Final snapshot: items=467 after report creation (Epic=49 Feature=77 Task=266 Issue=28 Chore=47); status mix open=3 in_progress=1 blocked=4 closed=450 canceled=9.

Validation status: metadata/resolution/history_drift/command_references all clean. Residual warning: validate_files_missing_linked_paths:9 is tracked as follow-up issue pm-m9tv. Future improvement feature: pm-7lum for duplicate-cluster automation/reporting.

Report scope: baseline vs final counts, hierarchy integrity remediation, duplicate-cluster consolidation mappings, metadata enrichment outcomes, validation sweep status, and residual issue tracking links for remaining product-level warnings.

Baseline snapshot: items=464 before new follow-ups; metadata warnings close_reason_missing=83 estimate_missing=1; hierarchy anomalies self_parent=212 and missing_parent_non_epic=2.

Execution outcomes: hierarchy repairs=214+1 anomaly fix; duplicate clusters consolidated=9 with 31 superseded mappings; metadata contextualization updates applied across all items; closed missing close_reason reduced to 0; missing estimated_minutes reduced to 0.

Final snapshot: items=467 after report creation (Epic=49 Feature=77 Task=266 Issue=28 Chore=47); status mix open=3 in_progress=1 blocked=4 closed=450 canceled=9.

Validation status: metadata/resolution/history_drift/command_references all clean. Residual warning: validate_files_missing_linked_paths:9 is tracked as follow-up issue pm-m9tv. Future improvement feature: pm-7lum for duplicate-cluster automation/reporting.

Final post-close correction: current tracker totals are items=467 with status mix open=3 blocked=4 closed=451 canceled=9 (in_progress=0). Full validate sweep is clean for metadata/resolution/history_drift/command_references; only validate --check-files residual warning remains and is tracked by pm-m9tv.
